blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 294 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
